title: Create: Cobblemon Tweaks
description: A mod that changes Cobblemon recipes witth Create mod
body:
![title](https://i.ibb.co/fXWxwCB/cctweaks-page-0.webp) ![description](https://i.ibb.co/TwM4mJm/cctweaks-page-1.webp) ![recipes](https://i.ibb.co/k9qhrFd/cctweaks-page-2.webp) ![other projects](https://i.ibb.co/8PkN8z4/cctweaks-page-projects.webp)
Image transcription Create: Cobblemon Tweask is a unique mod developed to seamlessly integrate our custom Cobblemon recipes with the Create mod. Not only dose it improve gameplay by combining the creativity of create and the adventure of Cobblemon, but it also connects the two mods, making it easier and more intuitive to craft, automate and enjoy the best of both worlds.
[**![Bisect](https://i.ibb.co/7NW2SY3/8d721697-200b-4168-81cd-f1daa8d8a680.png)**](https://bisecthosting.com/Subthy?r=CCTweaks)
